revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Festival of fire]][[fr:Himatsuri]][[hi:अग्न्युत्सव]][[ja:火祭り]]


{{Otheruses|primarily traditional festivals}}
[[File:DONDOYAKI.JPG|thumb|240px|{{ill|Katsuyama Sagicho|ja|勝山左義長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuyama Sagicho|qq=}}]]
[[File:Yoshida Fire Festival 20190826c.jpg|thumb|240px|{{ill|Yoshida Fire Festival|ja|吉田の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Fire Festival|qq=}}]]
[[File:Tedikara no himaturi natu 2.JPG|thumb|240px|{{ill|Tejikara Fire Festival|ja|手力の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikara Fire Festival|qq=}}]]
[[File:Okazaki-Takisanji-7.jpg|thumb|240px|{{ill|Takisanji Oni Festival|ja|滝山寺鬼まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takisanji Oni Festival|qq=}}]]
[[File:鳥羽の火祭り (愛知県幡豆郡幡豆町鳥羽) - Panoramio 41920859.jpg|thumb|240px|Toba Fire Festival]]
[[File:広河原松上げ2.jpg|thumb|240px|{{ill|Matsuage|ja|松上げ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuage|qq=}}]]
[[File:Todaiji Syunie Nara JPN 001.JPG|thumb|240px|[[Tōdai-ji]]'s {{ill|Shuni-e|en|Shuni-e|qid=Q3482654|lt=Shunie|1=Shuni-e}}]]
[[File:火とぼし - panoramio.jpg|thumb|Daihata no Hitoboshi]]

'''Himatsuri''' (火祭り) refers to festivals where fire or flames play a significant role.

== Major Fire Festivals by Region ==
== Japan ==
In addition to the examples below, the ''{{ill|Sagichō Fire Festival|en|Sagichō Fire Festival|qid=Q9332740|lt=Sagicho|1=Sagichō Fire Festival}}'' (Dondo-yaki) festival is held throughout Japan during the [[Japanese New Year|Koshōgatsu]].

* {{ill|Orochon Fire Festival|ja|オロチョンの火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orochon Fire Festival|qq=}} - Abashiri, Hokkaido
* {{ill|Aomori Nebuta Matsuri|en|Aomori Nebuta Matsuri|qid=Q862407|lt=Aomori Nebuta|1=Aomori Nebuta Matsuri}} - Aomori City, Aomori Prefecture
* {{ill|Akita Kantō|en|Akita Kantō|qid=Q4701224|lt=Akita Kantō|1=Akita Kantō}} - Akita City, Akita Prefecture
* {{ill|Taimatsu Akashi|ja|松明あかし|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taimatsu Akashi|qq=}} - Sukagawa City, Fukushima Prefecture
* Daihata no Hitoboshi - Minamimaki Village, Gunma Prefecture
* {{ill|Atago Fire Festival|ja|愛宕社の火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine Fire Festival|qq=}} - Uozu City, Toyama Prefecture, {{ill|Uozu Shrine|ja|魚津神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uozu Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Nebuta Nagashi|ja|滑川のネブタ流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nebuta Nagashi|qq=}} - Namerikawa City, Toyama Prefecture
* {{ill|Mukōda Fire Festival|lt=Mukōda Fire Festival|lt=Mukoda Fire Festival|ja|向田の火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukoda Fire Festival|qq=}} - Nanao City, Ishikawa Prefecture, {{ill|Iyahime Shrine|ja|伊夜比咩神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyahime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Oniyama Fire Festival|ja|鬼ヶ嶽火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oniyama Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Echizen City, Fukui Prefecture, {{ill|Omushi Shrine|ja|大虫神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omushi Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Katsuyama Sagicho|ja|勝山左義長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuyama Sagicho|qq=}} - Katsuyama City, Fukui Prefecture
* {{ill|Yoshida Fire Festival|ja|吉田の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Fire Festival|qq=}} - Fujiyoshida City, Yamanashi Prefecture, {{ill|Kitaguchi Hongū Fuji Sengen Shrine|lt=Kitaguchi Hongū Fuji Sengen Shrine|lt=Kitaguchi Hongu Fuji Sengen Shrine|ja|北口本宮冨士浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaguchi Hongu Fuji Sengen Shrine|qq=}} and Suwa Shrine
* {{ill|Nambu Fire Festival|ja|南部の火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nambu Fire Festival|qq=}} - Nanbu Town, Yamanashi Prefecture
* Nakazato Fire Blossom Festival - Kiyose City, Tokyo, {{ill|Fujizuka of Nakazato|ja|中里の富士塚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujizuka of Nakazato|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Akiba Fire Festival|ja|秋葉の火まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Tenryu Ward, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture, {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kanayama Fire Festival|ja|館山寺火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture, {{ill|Kanzan-ji Temple|ja|舘山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanzan-ji Temple|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sacred Fire Festival|ja|御神火まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sacred Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Fujinomiya City, Shizuoka Prefecture, {{ill|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|en|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|qid=Q653180|lt=Fujisan Hongu Sengen Taisha|1=Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha}}
* Taimatsu Festival - Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture, {{ill|Mishaji Shrine|ja|御射神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishaji Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Sakaki Festival - Saku City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Dosojin Festival|ja|道祖神祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dosojin Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Nozawa Onsen Village, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tejikara Fire Festival|ja|手力の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikara Fire Festival|qq=}} - Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture, {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Imao Sagicho|ja|今尾の左義長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imao Sagicho|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture, {{ill|Imao Shrine|ja|今尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imao Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Takisanji Oni Festival|ja|滝山寺鬼まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takisanji Oni Festival|qq=}} - Okazaki City, Aichi Prefecture, {{ill|Takisanji|lt=Takisanji|lt=Takisanji Temple|ja|滝山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takisanji Temple|qq=}}
* {{ill|Natsuyama Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Fire Festival|qq=}} - Okazaki City, Aichi Prefecture, {{ill|Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine|ja|夏山八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Toba Fire Festival|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Fire Festival|qq=}} - Nishio City, Aichi Prefecture, {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Gozan no Okuribi|en|Gozan no Okuribi|qid=Q2914758|lt=Gozan Okuribi|1=Gozan no Okuribi}} - Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture
* {{ill|Kurama Fire Festival|ja|鞍馬の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama Fire Festival|qq=}} - Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture, {{ill|Yuki Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Yuki Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Yuki Shrine|ja|由岐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuki Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Matsuage|ja|松上げ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuage|qq=}} - Kyoto City and Nantan City, Kyoto Prefecture
* {{ill|Shuni-e|en|Shuni-e|qid=Q3482654|lt=Shunie|1=Shuni-e}} - Nara City, Nara Prefecture, {{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|qid=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}}
* {{ill|Inamura Fire Festival|ja|稲村の火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inamura Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Hirokawa Town, Wakayama Prefecture
* {{ill|Oto Matsuri|lt=Oto Matsuri|lt=Otou Festival|ja|御燈祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otou Festival|qq=}} - Shingu City, Wakayama Prefecture, {{ill|Kamikura Shrine|ja|神倉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikura Shrine|qq=}}

==Other countries==

=== Korea ===
* {{ill|Haman Falling Fire Nori|ja|咸安落火ノリ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haman Falling Fire Nori|qq=}} (Gyeongsangnam-do Intangible Cultural Property)<ref>[https://japanese.visitkorea.or.kr/svc/contents/infoHtmlView.do?menuSn=607&vcontsId=199833 火の粉舞い散る、幻想的な「咸安落火ノリ」（VisitKorea）]</ref>

=== China ===
* {{ill|Torch Festival|zh|火把节|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torch Festival|qq=}} (Yi people)<ref>[http://www.peoplechina.com.cn/maindoc/html/guanguang/jieri/200203/200203.htm 雲南省大理 ペー族・火把節（人民中国）]</ref>

=== Spain ===
* {{ill|Fallas|en|Fallas|qid=Q1143768|lt=Fallas|1=Fallas}} - Valencia (March)
* {{ill|Bonfires of Saint John|ca|Fogueres d'Alacant|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bonfires of Saint John|qq=}} - Alicante (June)

=== Switzerland ===
* {{ill|Sechseläuten|ja|ゼクセロイテン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sechseläuten|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Zurich (April)

=== Scotland ===
* Up Helly Aa - Shetland Islands (last Tuesday of January)

=== Christian Countries ===
* {{ill|Saint John's Eve|en|Saint John's Eve|qid=Q10398273|lt=Saint John's Eve|1=Saint John's Eve}} (late June)

== Works Themed on Fire Festivals ==
* ''Orochon no Himatsuri'' - A song by {{ill|Hisao Itō|ja|伊藤久男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisao Itō|1=Hisao Itō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11379822}}, inspired by the festival in Abashiri, Hokkaido.

== See Also ==
* {{ill|Wicker man|en|Wicker man|qid=Q2271143|lt=Wicker man|1=Wicker man}}
* {{ill|Burning Man|en|Burning Man|qid=Q152518|lt=Burning Man|1=Burning Man}}
* {{ill|Walpurgis Night|en|Walpurgis Night|qid=Q200982|lt=Walpurgis Night|1=Walpurgis Night}}
* {{ill|Zoroastrianism|en|Zoroastrianism|qid=Q9601|lt=Zoroastrianism|1=Zoroastrianism}}
* {{ill|Festival of Lights|en|Festival of Lights|qid=Q2619364|lt=Festival of Lights (disambiguation)|1=Festival of Lights}}

== References ==
{{Reflist}}

== External Links ==
* [https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%81%AB%E7%A5%AD-120809 火祭(ひまつり)とは] - {{ill|Kotobank|en|Kotobank|qid=Q11302260|lt=Kotobank|1=Kotobank}}
* [http://sagityo.max21.info/ 今尾の左義長まつり]
